items.name: (R) Nemean Cestus [ADJUST] [Kratos]
items.description:
ADJUST IN ACCESSORY EDITOR!

This model has been shifted to fit this accessory into the Roblox shoulder bounding box.
Use the Accessory Adjustment Editor to adjust it correctly.
Position Y to minimum; Rotation Z to minimum; Scale to max.
Aside from that, you have to fine-tune it.

LEFT VERSION:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/71436965278579/

JOIN THE SERVER FOR FURTHER HELP

"Kratos, you now possess the Nemean Cestus. Use their strength to make the very earth tremble."
